papers.name: Paper 2 Short Answer and Data Response
papers.coverage_notes: Short-answer, data response, and structured questions.

assessment_objectives.name: Demonstrate knowledge and understanding
assessment_objectives.description: Demonstrate knowledge and understanding of economic concepts, terminology and principles.
classification_hints: Items asking for definitions, terminology, recall of economic concepts.

assessment_objectives.name: Apply knowledge and understanding
assessment_objectives.description: Apply knowledge and understanding to a range of economic problems.
classification_hints: Items requiring calculation, interpretation of data, application to scenarios.

assessment_objectives.name: Analyse, evaluate and make judgements
assessment_objectives.description: Analyse, evaluate and make judgements about economic information, issues and arguments.
classification_hints: Items requiring analysis, evaluation, weighing up of arguments.

question_styles.name: Multiple choice
question_styles.description: Tests breadth of knowledge across the syllabus.

question_styles.name: Data response
question_styles.description: Interpretation of economic data, charts and tables.

difficulty_ladder.description: Recall of facts, definitions or single-step application.

lesson_use.notes: Set supported=true only when a teacher/student/parent mode is declared and validated.

marking_guidance.command_words_ref: CAIE IGCSE Economics command words (state, explain, analyse, evaluate, discuss) are defined in Section 4 of the syllabus.
marking_guidance.notes: Single-tier qualification (grades A*-G). Both papers required.
